title: Call for expressions of interest to develop overview and position papers on foodways as living heritage
content: UNESCO invites experts or consortia to develop an ‘overview paper’ and a ‘position paper’ on foodways as living heritage, including a compilation of research bibliography for the ‘International Food Atlas’ project, supported by the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Proposals should reach UNESCO (ich-capacity@unesco.org …
sourceTitle: Follow the News published by UNESCO on Intangible Cultural Heritage
